title: Ubiquiti UniFi AI Key
description: The Ubiquiti UniFi AI Key is an advanced edge AI appliance designed to elevate your UniFi Protect security system . It enhances detection capabilities with powerful features like NeXT AI natural language search , AI alerts , speech transcription and image enhancement . It features (1) 1Gbit PoE++ In port and an intuitive display. AI Key adds face and license plate recognition for Protect G4/G5 cameras with higher capacity than AI Port and can process up to 1000 smart detections per hour .… G4 Series G5 Series G6 Series AI Series Cameras connected via AI Port
